{{ define "main" }} {{ $p := .Site.Params }}
Kotlin & JVM · Open Source

Mock LLM APIs
with confidence

Mokksy & AI-Mocks let you test AI-powered applications without hitting real LLM endpoints. Streaming, SSE, error simulation — all included.

Read the Docs {{ with $p.github }} View on GitHub {{ end }}
{{ highlight `// Kotlin DSL — mock any LLM in 5 lines val server = anthropicAiMock() server.onRequest { respondWith { content = "Hello, I'm a mocked Claude!" stopReason = "end_turn" model = "claude-opus-4-0" } } // Point your Anthropic SDK at the mock server val client = AnthropicOkHttpClient.builder() .baseUrl(server.baseUrl()) .apiKey("any-key") .build()` "kotlin" "" }}

Supports all major LLM providers & protocols

🤖 Anthropic ✦ OpenAI ◆ Google Gemini 🦙 Ollama ⇄ Agent2Agent (A2A) ⛓ LangChain4j 🌱 Spring AI

Why Mokksy

Everything WireMock isn't
for AI testing

Built for the unique challenges of testing LLM-powered applications — streaming, chunked responses, and non-determinism included.
